title: Sinkhole Restorer
description: Restores glitched aquifers in valleys (aka sinkholes) in 1.19.3+
body:
Found some seeds that are supposed to generate sinkholes down to the bottom of the world but instead on 1.19.3+ you got disappointed by the very deep lakes in place of the sinkhole? Or don't want to generate them in 1.19.2 and upgrade the world to your desired version? Then this mod is for you!

This very simple mod reverts the "sinkhole" bug fix that Mojang silently introduced in version 1.19.3, whereby aquifers no longer generate from world bottom to sea level at places with extremely negative weirdness or peaks/valleys noise values.

Relevant video by TheMisterEpic: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1cHCq2FcleI

**Note:** Changes by loading/unloading this mod will take effect on all newly generated chunks, since this mod alters vanilla aquifer worldgen code directly without any data packs involved.

## Before & After
![First frame: Before, normal-looking lakes but very deep; Second frame: After, sinkhole generates down to lava level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f6b4a8a7fa05a2780f50f90cabf5c1cc8c392e5.gif)
